name: 14_system_a_boundary_return_equals_hwm
description: Branch 3 / System A boundary: current_return EXACTLY equals safe_hwm. The fall-below clause uses strict `<`, so equality FAILS the condition.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 3.0 >= cross 2.0 TRUE, but current_return 3.0 < safe_hwm 3.0 is FALSE (`<` is strict) -> condition not met -> vwap_ticks reset to 0. is_vwap_broken False. System B: current_return 3.0 <= bleed_arm -1.0 FALSE -> bleed reset. Returns (0, 0, False, False). Boundary pin: System A fall-below uses strict `<`.
